protein_name: Structural protein that stabilizes microvessels and muscle cells, both in heart and in skeletal muscle. Restin potently inhibits angiogenesis. Belongs to the multiplexin collagen family. Expressed predominantly in internal organs such as adrenal gland, pancreas and kidney. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
